events.notes: Genesis supply of 360M AVAX minted at mainnet launch (July 2020); represents the initial circulating + locked allocation across all tranches.
Public sale (ICO) allocation of ~72M AVAX (10% of genesis supply), released at or shortly after mainnet launch in tranches.
Airdrop allocation (~9.7M AVAX, ~2.7% of genesis) distributed to community at launch.
Team & employee allocation (~10% of genesis = ~36M AVAX) subject to 1-year cliff then 4-year linear vest; first tranche unlocks ~12 months post-mainnet.
Seed/private sale investors (~3.5% of genesis) begin unlocking after 1-year lock-up; linear vest over subsequent 18 months per Messari profile.
Avalanche Foundation began periodic unlocks of its ~9.26% genesis allocation for ecosystem grants and development; exact monthly cadence disclosed in foundation updates.
Ongoing staking rewards emitted continuously from the remaining ~144M AVAX staking reserve (20% of max supply = 720M); emission rate decays over ~12 years until max supply is reached.
Cumulative staking reserve of ~144M AVAX (20% of 720M max supply) to be fully emitted by approximately 2030 via validator staking rewards; exact end-date is approximate.

summary: AVAX launched in July 2020 with a genesis supply of 360M tokens (50% of the 720M hard cap), split across public sales (~10%), team (~10%, 1-year cliff + 4-year vest), seed investors (~3.5%, 1-year lock + 18-month vest), foundation (~9.26%, discretionary unlocks for ecosystem), and airdrop (~2.7%). The remaining 360M tokens (50% of max supply) are reserved for staking rewards, emitted gradually to validators over roughly a decade, creating a slow but persistent inflationary tail. The heaviest discrete unlock pressure occurred in 2021–2023 as team and investor tranches vested; by 2024 most scheduled vesting is complete and remaining supply growth comes only from staking emissions.
caveats: 1) Tokenunlocks.app AVAX page requires a paid subscription for granular per-date unlock data; exact monthly unlock amounts for team/investor tranches could not be confirmed for free. 2) The Avalanche Foundation has not published a fully granular public unlock calendar; foundation unlock cadence is inferred from blog posts and Messari free-tier summaries. 3) Token amounts for individual vesting tranches (team, seed) are approximate, derived from percentage allocations in the public launch announcement multiplied by the 360M genesis supply — actual on-chain figures may differ slightly. 4) Staking emission end-date (~2030) is an estimate; the protocol adjusts emission based on staking participation rate. 5) Some early Medium posts cited have been archived or moved; URLs may redirect.
